title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is an innovative demo application that generates personalized user interface elements and images for latte art using Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini. It combines agentic features and Agent-to-UI technology to enable real-time co-creation of dynamic, on-demand visual experiences tailored to individual customer preferences.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a demo app that generates personalized UI elements and latte art images from Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini. It shows how agentic features and Agent-to-UI technology drive real-time co-creation of dynamic, on-demand visuals tailored to individual customer preferences. The relevance is the pairing of agent orchestration with generated interfaces, where the model produces both imagery and UI rather than static screens.
